item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Mental Health Parity Enforcement
item.description:
👀 Mental Health Parity Enforcement

Mental Health Parity Act enforcement 119th Congress: network-adequacy enforcement · reimbursement-parity audits · NQTL non-quantitative-treatment-limitation rules. Composes with Rural Mental Health Access + Medicare/Medicaid expansion + #5 Family Table. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
